title: GPU power spike exceeds PDU threshold on gpu01
summary: gpu01 power draw reached 650W (~71% above baseline of ~380W) during job 920001 (llm_train_run7, bob). Facility PDU threshold is 600W per node. Sustained spike started ~14:00 UTC.

timeline.event: Power draw began climbing on gpu01

notes: Job is still running. Sysadmin must decide whether to throttle or cancel.
